portal.metaDescription: Your LMP Financial Borrower Portal: upcoming consultations, your saved quiz match, and your application progress.

bookings.headline: Your scheduled calls
bookings.loadError: Could not load your consultations. Try refreshing the page.
bookings.emptyBody: You don't have any upcoming consultations yet.
bookings.demoNote: Showing sample bookings until Calendly is wired in Phase 2A.

savedQuiz.headline: Recommended for you
savedQuiz.noQuizBody: You haven't taken our 5-question quiz yet. It will recommend the right loan program and the right loan officer for your situation.
savedQuiz.outdatedBody: Your saved quiz result references an outdated recommendation.

application.headline: Continue your application
application.body: Pick up where you left off in our secure application portal. You will move into a hosted form built for mortgage applications: SSN, employment, and address history. We hand you off there with your contact info already known to us.
application.helperPrefix: Not sure which loan officer to start with?
application.secureBadge: Hosted with our application partner · Secure

signIn.metaTitle: Sign In to Your Borrower Portal
signIn.metaDescription: Sign in to your LMP Financial Borrower Portal to see upcoming consultations, your saved quiz result, and your application progress.
signIn.headline: Sign in to your account
signIn.subheadline: No password needed. Enter the email you used to book a call or take the quiz, and you'll be signed in.

form.errorGeneric: Could not sign you in with that email. Try again.
form.errorUnexpected: Something went wrong signing you in. Please try again.

checkInbox.headline: Check your inbox
checkInbox.bodyTemplate: We sent a sign-in link to {email}. Click the link in the email to access your portal. The link expires in 24 hours.
checkInbox.missingPrefix: Did not get it? Check spam, or
